BEN_PL_TYP_F PLTY , BEN_PTIP_F PTIP , FF_FORMULAS_F FFL , FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT Where PGM.PGM_ID=PTIP.PGM_ID AND PLTY.PL_TYP_ID=PTIP.PL_TYP_ID AND PTIP.ENRT_RL=FFL.FORMULA_ID AND FFL.FORMULA_TYPE_ID=FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID
